languages.text: {n}Как бы тяжелы не были бои в обороне, это позволило сохранить немало жизней. Кровожадные ксеносы лезли на укрепления, не страшась гибели — но преодоление линий обороны дало гвардейцам достаточно времени проредить ораву железных мертвецов.{/n}

{n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Как бы тяжелы не были бои в обороне, это позволило сохранить немало жизней. Кровожадные ксеносы лезли на укрепления, не страшась гибели — но преодоление линий обороны дало гвардейцам достаточно времени проредить ораву железных мертвецов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

{n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

{n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

languages.text: {n}守備戦は厳しいものだったが、多くの命を救った。血に飢えた異種族は死を恐れずに要塞を登るが、守備線の突破はガードマンに鉄の死者の群れを減らす時間を与えた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}守備戦は厳しいものだったが、多くの命を救った。血に飢えた異種族は死を恐れずに要塞を登るが、守備線の突破はガードマンに鉄の死者の群れを減らす時間を与えた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aunque las batallas defensivas fueron cruentas, salvaron muchas vidas. Los xenos sanguinarios escalaron las fortificaciones sin miedo a morir, pero el tiempo que tardaron en atravesarlas permitió a los guardias reducir el tamaño de la horda de cadáveres de hierro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aunque las batallas defensivas fueron cruentas, salvaron muchas vidas. Los xenos sanguinarios escalaron las fortificaciones sin miedo a morir, pero el tiempo que tardaron en atravesarlas permitió a los guardias reducir el tamaño de la horda de cadáveres de hierro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}防御战空前残酷，但无数生命得以拯救。嗜血的异形无惧死亡，攀越壁垒。但每一道被突破的防线，都为守军争取下了削弱这些铁块死人的宝贵时间。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}防御战空前残酷，但无数生命得以拯救。嗜血的异形无惧死亡，攀越壁垒。但每一道被突破的防线，都为守军争取下了削弱这些铁块死人的宝贵时间。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Abwehrschlachten waren hart, haben aber viele Leben gerettet. Die blutrünstigen Xenos kletterten furchtlos auf die Befestigungen, aber ihr Vorstoß durch unsere Abwehrreihen gab den Gardisten Zeit, ihre eisernen Horden auszudünnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Abwehrschlachten waren hart, haben aber viele Leben gerettet. Die blutrünstigen Xenos kletterten furchtlos auf die Befestigungen, aber ihr Vorstoß durch unsere Abwehrreihen gab den Gardisten Zeit, ihre eisernen Horden auszudünnen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Savunma savaşları çetin geçse de birçok hayat kurtardılar. Kana susamış zenolar, ölüm korkusu olmadan tahkimatlara tırmandı. Ancak savunma hatlarının yarılması, Muhafızlara demir ölü sürüsünü seyreltmek için zaman kazandırdı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Savunma savaşları çetin geçse de birçok hayat kurtardılar. Kana susamış zenolar, ölüm korkusu olmadan tahkimatlara tırmandı. Ancak savunma hatlarının yarılması, Muhafızlara demir ölü sürüsünü seyreltmek için zaman kazandırdı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les batailles pour la défense de la colonie furent rudes, mais bien des vies furent épargnées. Si les xénos sanguinaires les escaladèrent avec une témérité débridée, les fortifications offrirent aux gardes le temps d'affaiblir la horde des morts de fer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Though the defensive battles were harsh, they saved many lives. The bloodthirsty xenos scaled the fortifications without fear of death, but the breaching of the defensive lines gave the Guardsmen time to thin out the horde of iron dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les batailles pour la défense de la colonie furent rudes, mais bien des vies furent épargnées. Si les xénos sanguinaires les escaladèrent avec une témérité débridée, les fortifications offrirent aux gardes le temps d'affaiblir la horde des morts de fer.{/n}
